zh.lifeSummary: 當Adenor Laval於大約1080年出生在法國麥延賴伐爾時，她的父親Guy de Laval44歲，母親Denise Mortain22歲。她和Raoul de Beaumont至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1137年在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯波蒙特享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Adenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Haitian (Agénor): from the personal name Agénor, French form of classical Greek Agēnōr meaning ‘manly, heroic’ (from agan ‘very’ and anēr ‘man’). According to Greek legend, this was the name of a Phoenician king of Tyre who lived in the third millenium BC .

en.lifeSummary: When Adenor Laval was born about 1080, in Laval, Mayenne, France, her father, Guy de Laval, was 44 and her mother, Denise Mortain, was 22. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Raoul de Beaumont. She died about 1137, in Beaumont, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adenor Laval est née environ 1080, à Laval, Mayenne, France, son père, Guy de Laval, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Denise Mortain, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Raoul de Beaumont. Elle est décédée environ 1137, à Beaumont, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adenor Laval um 1080 in Laval, Mayenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Laval 44 und ihre Mutter Denise Mortain 22. Sie hatte mit Raoul de Beaumont mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1137 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Beaumont, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adenor Laval è nata il circa 1080 nel Laval, Mayenne, Francia, sua padre, Guy de Laval, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Denise Mortain, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Raoul de Beaumont. Morì circa 1137, nel Beaumont, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adenor Laval(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 메이니 라발에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Laval(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Denise Mortain(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Raoul de Beaumont(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1137년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 보몽에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adenor Laval nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Laval, Mayenne, França, seu pai, Guy de Laval, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Denise Mortain, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Raoul de Beaumont. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1137, em Beaumont, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adenor Laval родилась около 1080 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Laval было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Denise Mortain, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Raoul de Beaumont. Она умерла около 1137 г. в местности бомонт, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.
